entity.summary: Sui ecosystem decentralized exchange and liquidity aggregator supporting direct swaps, multi-source routing, concentrated liquidity, liquidity pools, yield farming, and perpetual trading services.
entity.notes: HEI models FlowX CLMM and V2/V3 discovery rows as one FlowX exchange entity. Current first-party documentation describes FlowX as a Sui DEX with swap, aggregator, liquidity, farming, and perpetual product surfaces under one protocol identity.

evidence.title: FlowX Finance Protocol Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies FlowX as an ecosystem-focused decentralized exchange built on Sui and lists swapping, liquidity contribution, yield farming, and related services.

evidence.title: FlowX Swap documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap documentation describes FlowX Swap as a core product and documents one-to-many swaps and liquidity aggregation across Sui DEX venues.

evidence.title: FlowX DEX Aggregator documentation
evidence.notes: First-party aggregator documentation describes routing and splitting swaps across integrated Sui liquidity sources and identifies the aggregator as the default FlowX swap interface feature.
